title: GabborsSMP
description:
Required modpack for the Gabbors server.
Also available for other use.

This is a Modpack with minimal QOL mods to make vanilla minecraft a bit better.
body:
## Gabbors Modpack

This modpack is required to play on the Gabbors server, but you can also use it for singleplayer or other servers. It’s a small and lightweight pack that adds a few quality-of-life mods to make vanilla Minecraft feel better to play.

The mods included don’t change the core gameplay or balance. They just add helpful tweaks, small improvements, and nicer usability while keeping the game feeling like normal vanilla Minecraft.
